settings.managedCloudDescription: Unlock the full power of Pulse Editor instantly with managed cloud you get lightning-fast AI assistance, cross-platform syncing, creative tools. So you always stay in flow.
settings.byoAPIKeysDescription: Bring Your Own API Keys lets you connect directly to AI providers. More setup required, but you stay in full control.

settings.ttlDescription: The API tokens are saved for the duration of the TTL (Time To Live) days. After the TTL, the API tokens will be deleted when the app opens next time. Set -1 to keep the tokens indefinitely.

openSourceInfoModal.title: Open Source
openSourceInfoModal.description: We believe in open software because transparency fosters trust, innovation, and collaboration. Our mission is to empower developers worldwide by providing free access to the tools they need to build, create, and innovate without barriers.
openSourceInfoModal.cloudServices: Meanwhile, we offer cloud hosted services and marketplace so you can easily manage your projects and share your work with the community without worrying about the infrastructure and backend.
openSourceInfoModal.loveWhatWeDo: Love what we are doing? Support us by giving a star on GitHub or downloading our mobile app on Google Play!
